page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.16xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server powered by 64 dedicated physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio with 128.0 GB of system memory, translating to 2.0 GB per core. The processor includes a 48 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Deep Learning Boost. The instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, but it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

In multi-core benchmarks, the server demonstrates strong performance, scoring high in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU tests. Its memory subsystem achieves high cached read bandwidth of 3426.19 GB/sec, though uncached large-block reads and writes fall into the average tier. Cryptographic and database operations also rank in the top tier, alongside software compilation and ray tracing. Single-core performance and text processing remain average.

Given its dedicated compute resources and high multi-core density, the instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for parallel processing workloads that do not require local storage or massive memory footprints. It is well suited for multi-threaded applications, software compilation, database operations, and small-scale language model inference, while workloads requiring high memory capacity per core or local NVMe storage may face resource constraints.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.16xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server equipped with 64 dedicated physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz and 128.0 GB of RAM. Lacking local storage and GPUs, it relies on a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The server exhibits strong multi-core performance in benchmarks, particularly in multi-threaded decompression, software compilation, and database operations. Its memory subsystem delivers high cached read bandwidth, though uncached large-block operations are average. With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is designed for compute-heavy, parallel workloads such as compilation, database management, and small-scale model inference, offering a balanced profile for processing-intensive tasks without local storage dependencies.

tagline: A dedicated 64-core compute-optimized server with high multi-threaded performance and 32 Gbps network bandwidth for parallel processing workloads.

128.0 GB of RAM providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio

Strong multi-core performance in compilation and database operations
Optimized for parallel processing, software builds, and small-scale inference
